violations: Style-guard sentence length: multiple sentences likely exceed the 28-word max (e.g., ## Context paragraph defining “agent” vs “harness”; several ## Forces sub-bullets are also long).
Style-guard anthropomorphism risk: phrasing like “The harness enters Plan mode” attributes human-like action to the harness; rephrase to “The run begins in Plan mode” or similar.
Style-guard sentence length: ## Problem second paragraph is likely over the 28-word limit (the sentence beginning “More concretely: how do you get repeatable outcomes…”).
Style-guard sentence length: ## Implementation sketch diagram-intro sentence beginning “A diagram helps here because the harness is mostly about…” is likely over the 28-word limit.
Repetition/drift: ## Implementation sketch repeats the diagram-intro idea twice (two separate paragraphs both begin with “A diagram helps here because…”).

Style-guard sentence length: the sentence “In the diagram, solid arrows represent control/data flow for the run (what happens next), while dashed arrows represent trace and gate signals (what must be recorded or approved).” is likely over the 28-word limit.
